rationale: The citing study’s design relies on time-series econometric machinery (unit-root/cointegration tests, VAR/VECM, and generalized impulse responses), and the cited paper is a methodological guide on policy-simulation validity, exogeneity, stability, and interpretation limits of reduced-form VAR impulse responses. That methodological overlap makes this plausibly a substantive methods/foundational citation rather than an obvious incidental mention. With a direct DOI match present, this pair should be retained for full relation judgment.
